level_signals: Lead a small pod through focused, sprint-style engagements
Earn trust of CMOs, CMIOs, CIOs, and operational leaders
Founding Forward Deployed PM — sets the tone for what forward deployed means at Abridge

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of product management experience shipping products that users love, with a track record of owning product areas end-to-end.
Builder mentality. You've personally driven products from discovery through launch and iteration. You care about craft and quality in what you ship.
Strong user empathy and product taste. You instinctively know the difference between a product that works and one that delights.
Comfort with ambiguity. You can take a messy problem space and create a clear roadmap without waiting for perfect information.

Cross-functional credibility. You can go deep with engineers on technical tradeoffs, partner with design on interaction details, and operate as the senior product voice in front of CMOs, CMIOs, CIOs, and CFOs.
Track record of running time-bound, outcome-oriented engagements where the deliverable was a live system, not a document.
Willingness to travel ~20% on average, with surge periods around engagement kickoff and go-live.
Please only apply if you are open to relocation and our hybrid in-person model in San Francisco.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Healthcare or clinical workflow experience, or familiarity with Epic or other EHR platforms.
Prior experience in a forward deployed, solutions engineering, or customer-facing product role at an enterprise AI company.

scope.surface: Forward Deployed PM motion with health system partners; feeds back into core Abridge product suite
scope.business_model: enterprise B2B, AI-powered clinical documentation platform sold to health systems
primary_metrics_inferred: Core product improvements surfaced from field engagements
cross_functional_partners: Executive sponsors (CMOs, CMIOs, CIOs, CFOs) at health system partners
core_responsibilities: Run discovery on-site at partner accounts; meet with executive sponsors, clinicians, and integration teams
Lead a small pod through focused, sprint-style engagements
Own the product and feature answer for each engagement
Decide what gets built, what gets declined, and what gets routed to the core roadmap
Partner with internal product and engineering teams on net-new product builds
Feed field learnings directly back into the core Abridge product

green_flags: Founding role — high impact and visibility at a growing AI healthcare company
Clear and specific role description with well-defined responsibilities
Company has a differentiated technical claim (maps AI-generated summaries to ground truth via Linked Evidence)
Strong benefits package including sabbatical, lifestyle wallet, parental leave, and HSA contributions
Office locations in major tech hubs (SF, NYC, Pittsburgh)
red_flags: Requires relocation to San Francisco with mandatory hybrid in-person Mon/Wed/Fri — highly restrictive for non-local candidates
Travel ~20% with unspecified surge periods adds unpredictability
Role scope is broad and founding — high ambiguity for someone without prior forward deployed experience

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 7+ years requirement, founding/senior framing, and pod leadership)
seniority.manages_people (inferred from 'Lead a small pod' language)
scope.team_size_estimate (not stated; described only as 'small pod')
ambiguities: Archetype is ambiguous: role blends Technical PM, customer-facing/solutions PM, and potentially Program Manager. Classified as Technical PM with secondary archetype note given emphasis on technical tradeoffs and pod ownership.
manages_people: JD says 'Lead a small pod' which implies people leadership, but the pod may be a cross-functional team rather than direct reports — set to true but ambiguous.
Visa sponsorship: not mentioned anywhere in the JD; marked as unclear.
